NIGHT RAVEN—A prestigious four-year arcane academy. Its doors are only open to students deemed to possess magical aptitude as determined by a magical artifact called the Dark Mirror.

Night Raven College is an all-boys (ahem ahem..we can say you’re pretending to be a guy or just payed a shitload of money to be in here if youre a girl) academy and the main setting of Twisted Wonderland. It is a four-year magic educational institution located on top of a mountain on the north side of the Isle of Sages.
